holdings.infoBox: TAX is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at 2.16%, Sterling Infrastructure at 2.15%, Advanced Micro Devices at 1.96%, Twilio at 1.58%, and Amkor Technology at 1.57%.

overview.description: The Cambria Tax Aware ETF (TAX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects US stocks with value and quality characteristics and low or no dividend yields. The fund aims to generate capital appreciation without distributing high dividend income or taxable gains TAX was launched on Dec 18, 2024 and is issued by Cambria.
